parameters.query:
SELECT id, profile_id, email, full_name, referral_code, commission_pct, 
       tier, total_earned_cents, total_paid_cents, pending_cents, is_active
FROM affiliates
WHERE id = '{{ $json.affiliate_id }}' OR referral_code = '{{ $json.referral_code }}'
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO affiliate_referrals (affiliate_id, referred_email, referred_profile_id, 
  converted, converted_at, purchase_id, purchase_amount_cents, commission_cents)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.affiliate_id }}',
  '{{ $json.referred_email }}',
  '{{ $json.referred_profile_id }}',
  TRUE, NOW(),
  '{{ $json.purchase_id }}',
  {{ $json.amount_cents }},
  {{ $json.commission_cents }}
)
RETURNING id;

UPDATE affiliates
SET 
  total_earned_cents = total_earned_cents + {{ $json.amount_cents }},
  pending_cents = pending_cents + {{ $json.amount_cents }},
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.affiliate_id }}'
RETURNING total_earned_cents, pending_cents;

parameters.subject: =You earned ${{ ($json.amount_cents / 100).toFixed(2) }} — MindFrame Affiliate
